purpose: Test whether the current tuned RHS MCMC kernel becomes stationary with a much longer run.
decision_target: decide whether run length alone is enough

purpose: If A1 is promising, confirm whether single-chain failures are overstating the issue.
decision_target: separate poor single-chain diagnostics from true nonstationarity

purpose: Isolate stronger VB warm start alone with realistic short VB tau warmup.
decision_target: test whether init_from_vb is the main fix

purpose: Repeat the stronger VB warm-start study with a slightly stronger VB stabilizing pass.
decision_target: test sensitivity of MCMC to VB initializer strength

purpose: Test short MCMC tau freeze with the best stronger VB warm start.
decision_target: test whether short tau warmup reduces early RHS drift

purpose: Test moderate short MCMC tau freeze with the best stronger VB warm start.
decision_target: test whether tau warmup around 20 iterations is the best practical default

purpose: Upper end of realistic short tau freeze range.
decision_target: test whether longer but still realistic tau warmup helps more than 10 or 20

purpose: Narrow tau and c2 slice widths after the best init/warmup choice.
decision_target: test whether drift is due to overly aggressive tau/c2 exploration

purpose: Also narrow lambda after the best init/warmup choice.
decision_target: test whether the full RHS block needs a more conservative local geometry

purpose: Design study only: assess whether current transformed RHS coordinates are causing poor geometry.
decision_target: decide whether to implement a reparameterized RHS state

purpose: Design study only: assess blocked tau/c2 or tau/lambda updates.
decision_target: decide whether blocked hyperparameter updates are warranted

purpose: Design study only: assess whether a different RHS kernel is needed.
decision_target: decide whether to leave coordinate-wise slice for the RHS block
